title: Ghost Coder | Multi-Agent GitHub Issue Resolver
description: Built an autonomous multi-agent engineering system using LangGraph and LangChain that automates the Git issue-to-Pull Request pipeline. Engineered a  Docker sandbox with a reflective QA loop and integrated Groq with an automated GitOps pipeline using PyGithub.

title: Hybrid NLP Log Classification System
description: Created an NLP pipeline using semantic embeddings to automate log classification and intelligent incident routing across services. Improved classification accuracy by 40% through structured LLM-based inference and reduced manual triage effort by 30%.

title: Neonatal Sepsis Detection System
description: Architected a decentralized Federated Learning framework with Flower for neonatal sepsis detection, ensuring patient data privacy. Developed PyTorch Transformer models for time-series analysis and built a Streamlit dashboard to visualize local training metrics.

title: GenAI-Powered Course Builder Platform
description: Designed a full-stack course generator powered by the Gemini API to create structured, topic-specific learning modules. Aggregated relevant lecture resources using the YouTube Data API and managed persistent user data with MongoDB to store learning paths.
